title: 2026 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This is a navigation/index page on the Federal Reserve website that lists links to FOMC press releases from 2026, specifically dated 3/18/2026 and 1/28/2026. The page does not contain the actual content of any FOMC statement or decision—it is a directory page that requires clicking through to individual statements.
key_points: Page is a listing page containing links to multiple FOMC press releases, not the actual policy content
Listed dates include 3/18/2026 (statement and economic projections) and 1/28/2026 (statement and reaffirmation of longer-run goals)
No substantive policy content, vote tallies, rate decisions, or forward guidance is present in this source
why_it_matters: This page is not directly usable for research as it contains only hyperlinks to FOMC press releases. Actual FOMC statements, projections, and policy decisions would need to be retrieved from the individual linked pages. This listing page serves only as an index.
notes: Per CORE RULE 6: This page is a listing_page (directory/index) and is non-archiveable. No policy content, decisions, or substantive data is present. The source provides only hyperlinks and dates. To obtain archiveable content, individual FOMC statement pages must be crawled separately.

reasoning: Listing page with no substantive content
Only provides date metadata and links
